description: Version compatibility matrix for cross-domain contract pairs.

breaking_change_rules.field_removal: MAJOR bump on source; target must update or compatibility entry removed
breaking_change_rules.field_rename: MAJOR bump on source; target mapping must be updated
breaking_change_rules.field_semantic_change: MAJOR bump on source; target consumers must be revalidated
breaking_change_rules.new_optional_field: MINOR bump on source; target may ignore
breaking_change_rules.new_required_field: MAJOR bump on source; target must provide the field

breaking_change_rules.field_removal: MAJOR bump on source; target must update or compatibility entry removed
breaking_change_rules.field_rename: MAJOR bump on source; target mapping must be updated
breaking_change_rules.field_semantic_change: MAJOR bump on source; target consumers must be revalidated
breaking_change_rules.new_optional_field: MINOR bump on source; target may ignore
breaking_change_rules.new_required_field: MAJOR bump on source; target must provide the field

breaking_change_rules.field_removal: MAJOR bump on source; output lineage must be updated
breaking_change_rules.field_rename: MAJOR bump on source; output lineage must be updated
breaking_change_rules.field_semantic_change: MAJOR bump on source; output lineage must be updated
breaking_change_rules.new_optional_field: MINOR bump on source; output may ignore
breaking_change_rules.new_required_field: MAJOR bump on source; output must include in lineage
